id.description: The id of the existing counterparty.

is_resend.description: This field will be `true` if an email requesting account details has already been sent to this counterparty.

form_link.description: This is the link to the secure Modern Treasury form. By default, Modern Treasury will send an email to your counterparty that includes a link to this form. However, if `send_email` is passed as `false` in the body then Modern Treasury will not send the email and you can send it to the counterparty directly.
